/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc  -fPIC -Wall -DGMT_NO_CURL -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.6 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 6.0.0 -current_version 6.7.0 -o libpostscriptlight.6.7.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libpostscriptlight.6.dylib CMakeFiles/pslib.dir/postscriptlight.c.o  /Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/libs/darwin_arm/libzlib.a
